name: Honey Spiced Acorn Squash with Pineapple & Ci
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Acorn squash (cut into halves, remove strings and seeds; soak in hot water)
2 tablespoons orange zest (from fruit, juice, and peel)
1 tablespoon lemon zest (from fruit, juice, and peel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cut acorn squash halves, cut side down, in a baking pan.
2. Add about 1/4-inch hot water to the pan and place it in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C).
3. Bake the squash for about 40-45 minutes or until tender.
4. Scoop out the squash pulp into a large bowl and mash it with a fork or potato masher.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (honey, brown sugar, melted butter, orange zest, lemon zest, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and salt) to the mashed squash in the bowl.
6. Stir until thoroughly blended.
7. Spoon the mixture into a greased porcelain baking dish.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for an additional 20 minutes or until heated through.
9. Sprinkle a little cinnamon-sugar mixture on top when serving.
10. Serves 6.
